issue.message: Field requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#EFFECT_TICK`
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#EFFECT_CLICK`
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#EFFECT_HEAVY_CLICK`
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#EFFECT_DOUBLE_CLICK`
Call requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#createPredefined`
Call requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.os.VibrationEffect#createPredefined`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of Gradle than 9.1.0 is available: 9.5.0
A newer version of com.android.application than 9.0.0 is available: 9.2.1. (There is also a newer version of 9.0.𝑥 available, if upgrading to 9.2.1 is difficult: 9.0.1)
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.12.3 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2026.01.01 is available: 2026.05.00

A newer version of androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences than 1.2.0 is available: 1.2.1
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-compose than 2.9.7 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.security:security-crypto than 1.1.0-alpha06 is available: 1.1.0
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices
A newer version of com.launchdarkly:okhttp-eventsource than 4.2.0 is available: 4.3.0

Composable functions with a return type should start with a lowercase letter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Optional Modifier parameter should have a default value of `Modifier`

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Calling getBackStackEntry during composition without using `remember` with a NavBackStackEntry key
The native library `arm64-v8a/libtermux.so` (from `com.termux.termux-app:terminal-emulator:0.118.0`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libtermux.so` (from `com.termux.termux-app:terminal-emulator:0.118.0`) is not 16 KB aligned
The native library `arm64-v8a/libtermux.so` (from `com.termux.termux-app:terminal-emulator:0.118.0`) is not 16 KB aligned

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.
Formatting %d followed by words ("sub"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("files"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("messages"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("running"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("more"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
issue.errorLine1: override fun checkClientTrusted(chain: Array<out X509Certificate>?, authType: String?) {}

issue.message: `checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
issue.errorLine1: override fun checkServerTrusted(chain: Array<out X509Certificate>?, authType: String?) {}

issue.message: Implementing a custom `X509TrustManager` is error-prone and likely to be insecure. It is likely to disable certificate validation altogether, and is non-trivial to implement correctly without calling Android's default implementation.
Insecure Base Configuration
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 26 and < 29)
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This field leaks a context object

Use version catalog instead
Custom view ``TerminalView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
